summary: Frontend UI testing for 3 UI changes: Partner Staff create form (no email), Partner Pay 3-step flow, BidBlitz Pay QR hideBalance toggle. Tests 1 & 2 PASSED via Playwright. Test 3 verified via code review (authentication issues prevented live testing).

verified_elements: Name field present with placeholder 'Mitarbeiter Name'
Role dropdown with options: Theke (Nur Scanner & Pay), Admin (Voller Zugang)
'Login-Daten speichern' checkbox present and checked by default
NO email field in create form - CONFIRMED REMOVED

step_2.manual_input: Manual QR code input option available

test_3_bidblitz_pay_qr_hide_balance.note: Authentication issues prevented live Playwright testing, but code review confirms implementation

code_verification.hidden_balance_display: Lines 1790-1797: Shows '€••••' when hideBalance is true

partner_pay_flow.step_2: Camera scanner auto-starts after amount entry

critical_code_review_comments: All 3 UI changes implemented correctly as per requirements
Partner Staff form correctly removes email field from create form
Partner Pay correctly implements 3-step flow: Amount → Scan → Confirm
BidBlitz Pay QR correctly implements hideBalance toggle with €•••• display
seed_data_creation: None required - used existing test accounts
context_for_next_testing_agent: Three UI changes verified: 1) Partner Staff create form now shows only Name, Password, Role, and 'Login-Daten speichern' checkbox (no email field). 2) Partner Pay has new 3-step flow: enter amount first, then camera auto-starts, then confirm. 3) BidBlitz Pay QR view has 'Guthaben ausblenden' toggle that shows '€••••' when enabled. All German text as expected.
